name: qiskit
tagline: Reference guide for building, transpiling, and running quantum circuits with Qiskit on IBM Quantum hardware.
verdict: Clean, low-risk documentation skill: no credential harvesting, no shell-piped remote code, no hidden instructions, standard `pip install qiskit`. Cloud execution (QiskitRuntimeService) is the tool's stated purpose, using the user's own IBM credentials, not exfiltration. Minor gaps: no guidance on handling job/auth failures, and the overview repeats unverifie

highlights.summary: No guidance anywhere in the file for handling job failures, authentication errors, queue timeouts, or backend unavailability when running on real IBM hardware — a user hitting a Runtime error has no t
